subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! The glance of loving-kindness of the Lord of Names hath ever been, and shall continue to be, directed towards His servants and handmaidens [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله طرف عنایت مالک اسماء بعباد و اماء خود متوجه بوده و خواهد بود قلم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @Word of God and human limitations, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
